name: Perk Labs Inc.
summary: Perk Labs Inc. owns and operates a mobile ordering, contactless payments, and loyalty app in Canada and the United States. Its products include Perk Hero, a digital loyalty management platform that enables merchants to provide their customers with digital rewards and a more engaging and convenient customer experience; and Glance Pay mobile payments application. The company was formerly known as Glance Technologies Inc. and changed its name to Perk Labs Inc. in February 2020. Perk Labs Inc. is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
